Nick Nurse just met with the Philly reporters who made the trip to Vegas. 

On adding Jaylen Brown: "You watch him get a lot better from year to year to year, and how much harder that became to gameplan for him  … He’s sitting in his prime. It’s amazing that he’s going to be a Sixer."

items.title: One thing I'll be tracking with Caleb Wilson over Summer League is his shot profile.
items.author: Drew
items.body_excerpt:
One thing I'll be tracking with Caleb Wilson over Summer League is his shot profile.

He scored 35 points in his debut, but only three shot attempts came in the paint. 

It'll be interesting to see whether that was Memphis, the spacing around him or simply how the game unfolded.

items.title: The Phoenix win showed what the Sky can look like when their defensive identity shows up.
items.author: Drew
items.body_excerpt:
The Phoenix win showed what the Sky can look like when their defensive identity shows up.

The loss in Los Angeles was a reminder of how difficult it has been for them to sustain that level from game to game.

Reese's rare jersey number means everything to him. That's why he'll keep wearing No. 65 on his back, including when he faces his old team today.

"It just helps me think of her."
www.phillyvoice.com/sixers-news-...

media.title: Former Sixers forward Alex Reese honors late mother with unique jersey number: 'It just helps me think of her'
